title: ceratostylis philippinensis
intro: Ceratostylis philippinensis, a species of orchid native to the Philippines, is a type of terrestrial orchid belonging to the genus Ceratostylis. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Ceratostylis philippinensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
